answer_en:
Popliteus m.
Lateral rotation of the thigh at the knee joint, or medial rotation of the leg at the knee joint (to unlock the knee joint at the beginning of knee flexion)

details: Lateral rotation of the thigh at the knee joint, or medial rotation of the leg at the knee joint (to unlock the knee joint at the beginning of knee flexion)
